title: Tariri antidesma
intro:
There is no information on the plant 'Tariri antidesma'. It's possible that it may be a misspelling or a lesser-known plant species. However, based on my knowledge, I found information on 'Antidesma' and 'Tariri'. 'Tariri' is an alternate name for Antidesma, a genus of plants in the family Phyllanthaceae. Here is a paragraph on Antidesma:

Antidesma is a genus of plants that belongs to the family Phyllanthaceae, commonly known as the antidesma or tariri. Antidesma has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The bioactive constituents of Antidesma include flavonoids, alkaloids, and triterpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Antidesma is commonly used in traditional medicine to prepare teas, infusions, and other herbal preparations, including capsules and tinctures.
